markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on marketing assets, workflows, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Newsletter Strategy:** Adopt a "hook, results, link" format for case studies to drive clicks, and add product images to improve engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [**Workflow Automation:** To reduce Kaitlin's workload, GrowthX will pull content from Toric's Google Calendar and a new, centralized product roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [**Programmatic SEO:** A meeting with Thiago is required to define page requirements and CMS build-outs before development can begin.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** The content strategy will consolidate from many categories to 4–5 industry-specific themes, based on input from Miles.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)

## Topics

### Newsletter Feedback & Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Optimize the newsletter for engagement and clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**Customer Spotlight:**](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
      - [Shorten to a 1-paragraph summary → hook readers and drive clicks to the full case study.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
      - [Add product images to increase visual appeal.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [**Product Deep Dive:**](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
      - [Use concise blurbs instead of long paragraphs to maintain interest.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)

### Content Workflow Automation

  - [**Goal:** Automate content sourcing to reduce Kaitlin's manual effort.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [**Events:** GrowthX will pull from Toric's Google Calendar, which Kaitlin uses daily and finds easier to manage than Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [**Product Updates:** Miles will create a new, centralized channel for updates, replacing the current complex roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [**Written/Recorded Content:** GrowthX will source from the Google Sheet used for LinkedIn posts and event emails.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Process:** GrowthX will draft content 1 week in advance for product team review.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)

### Programmatic SEO Strategy

  - [**Blocker:** Development is on hold pending page requirements from Thiago.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [**Need:** A meeting to define page structure and necessary CMS build-outs.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

### Performance & Content Strategy

  - [**Reporting:** Shifting to monthly reports to align with the long-term engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** Consolidating from many categories to 4–5 industry-specific themes, per Miles's input.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:** Positive sentiment and strong positioning vs. competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
      - [**Observation:** Low citation rate (1%) for Datagrid.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
      - [**Reason:** LLMs currently favor larger platforms with AI add-ons for enterprise searches.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kaitlin:**](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Review the revised contract from Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Create a shareable Google Calendar for events.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
      - [Ask Miles to create a centralized product update channel.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [Share the Google Sheet used for social/email content.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
      - [Implement newsletter feedback (shorter blurbs, images).](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
      - [Reschedule the meeting with Thiago to **next Friday, 10:00 AM Central**.](https://fathom.video/share/HAEiBKnJ1xJRuezrju-9yMhhetp1xsTu?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
